questions.subject: Environment
questions.prompt: Which of the following best describes the structural composition and primary function of the IUCN Species Survival Commission (SSC)?

options.text: An intergovernmental panel under the United Nations that drafts legally binding treaties for the protection of endangered species.
A science-based network of volunteer experts that provides advisory information to the IUCN on biodiversity conservation and ecosystem health.
A financial mechanism established to directly fund grassroots wildlife conservation projects in developing nations.
A coalition of state representatives focused on enforcing international wildlife trade regulations.

questions.explanation: The IUCN SSC is not an intergovernmental regulatory body, UN panel, or financial mechanism. It was established in 1949 as a science-based network of over 10,500 volunteer experts. Its role is to provide information to the IUCN on biodiversity conservation, the inherent value of species, and their role in ecosystem health.
questions.takeaway: The IUCN SSC relies on volunteer scientific expertise rather than state delegates or regulatory enforcement to guide global biodiversity conservation efforts.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: Established in 1949, it is a science-based network of more than 10,500 volunteer experts... Role: To provide information to IUCN on biodiversity conservation, the inherent value of species, their role in ecosystem health and functioning, etc.

questions.subject: Environment
questions.prompt: Consider the following statements regarding the IUCN Species Survival Commission (SSC): 1. It was established as a specialized agency following the 1992 Earth Summit to monitor global species extinction rates. 2. It operates primarily through a network of volunteer experts rather than formal government representatives. Which of the statements given above is/are correct?
questions.explanation: Statement 1 is incorrect: The IUCN SSC was established much earlier, in 1949, not after the 1992 Earth Summit. Statement 2 is correct: It is a science-based network of more than 10,500 volunteer experts, distinguishing it from bodies composed of formal state delegates.
questions.takeaway: The IUCN SSC is a legacy institution (est. 1949) that leverages global volunteer scientific expertise to advise the IUCN, recently electing Indian conservationist Vivek Menon as its Chair.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: Established in 1949, it is a science-based network of more than 10,500 volunteer experts.
